title: Event Sourcing and CQRS: Event-Driven Architecture
author: Drew Patterson
Software Architect
description: Implement event sourcing with CQRS pattern—but event replay is computationally expensive
content:
Event sourcing stores state as a sequence of events. CQRS separates read and write models for scalability.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Event Storm (2035)](/docs/articles/event-storm-2035)
